title: helichrysum heterotrichum
intro: Helichrysum heterotrichum, also known as yellow fur or curry plant, is a perennial plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in wound healing and the reduction of swelling. The health benefits of Helichrysum heterotrichum include reducing stress, improving digestion, and promoting immune function, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant's essential oil is often used in herbal preparations, such as topical creams and ointments, and can also be consumed as a tea or added to food products for its culinary and medicinal uses.
